title: VANG LIAN NA KA TUAH DING TEL

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Jesu itna'n sihna pan hong gumkhia,
Mi khial kei a dingin a sisan luangkhia;

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Mangthang mi khial gilo kihuai peen in,
Vang lian a ka tuah ding tel;
(Oh kei bang leltak in vang lian a ka tuah ding,

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Oh a itna na'n Jesu'n hong gumkhia zo.
Phu loh vangletna tawh kei hong pom lai a;

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Tua vangletna pian dang sisan vang hi.
Pian dang vangletna hi ka tan dia lawwm lo:

sections.label: Verse 4
lines: Vantung ka tun dong a ka la ding hi
Pian dang sisan vang in vangletna kei a;
